generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance GantryCraneCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor controlling the cart's linear movement along the gantry beam. Part of the lab-scale gantry crane system for material handling."
]

instance GantryCraneHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor managing the vertical hoisting mechanism for container transport in the lab-scale gantry crane system."
]

instance GantryCraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet integrated at the end of the hoist to pick up and release containers (pucks) with precise positional control."
]

instance GreenhouseActuators : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuators within the greenhouse that dynamically adjust environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) based on real-time data."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional sensor measuring the swing angle of the gantry crane's hoist mechanism for precise control and feedback."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance CraneCartPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder tracking the linear position of the cart along the gantry beam for trajectory validation and control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionData
]

instance CraneHoistPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring the vertical position of the hoist mechanism for container transport."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionData
]

instance AirQualityCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor integrated with Raspberry Pi for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2Data
]

instance AirQualityParticulateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate matter sensor (e.g., PM2.5/PM10) for indoor air quality assessment in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ParticulateData
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for indoor environmental monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance AirQualityHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for indoor air quality management in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityData
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low-cost environmental sensors (unspecified types) within the greenhouse for real-time condition monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseEnvironmentalData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneCartPositionEncoder
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneHoistPositionEncoder
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCO2Sensor
]

instance ParticulateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityParticulateSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityTemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensors
]

instance CraneKinematicData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneCartPositionEncoder, CraneHoistPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric and behavioral model representing the kinematics of the lab-scale gantry crane, including movable components (hoist, trolley, bridge)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality simulation, prediction, and runtime visualization in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudEnabler, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for the greenhouse's digital twin, enabling dynamic adjustments to environmental conditions based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler, ActiveMQEnabler
]

instance PrerecordedGreenhouseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Preconfigured dataset embedded in VM images for GreenhouseDT simulation and analysis, representing historical greenhouse operational conditions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseEnvironmentalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance RealTimeCraneTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time-series data of crane kinematic states (position, velocity, acceleration) collected during operation for validation and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneKinematicData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance AirQualityHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical air quality measurements (CO2, particulate matter, temperature, humidity) stored for predictive analytics and trend analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2Data, ParticulateData, TemperatureData, HumidityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module (gantrylib) bundling core functionalities for the digital twin, including kinematic modeling and control logic for the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical and real-time operational data of the gantry crane, enabling efficient querying and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database used by GreenhouseDT for storing environmental data and enabling structured data storage and retrieval."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance ActiveMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating event-driven communication between the physical greenhouse and its digital twin for asynchronous synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance AzureCloudEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools providing cloud-based computational resources for real-time air quality simulation, prediction, and scalable data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityPredictionService, RuntimeVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard platform for monitoring crane performance, sensor data, and system status through interactive visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform ensuring portability and consistency of digital twin components across environments."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating bidirectional data exchange between the physical gantry crane and its digital twin for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimized control signals for the crane's actuators, leveraging kinematic models and historical data to improve performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, ActuatorControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements real-time synchronization and discrepancy detection between the physical crane and its digital twin to ensure fidelity and timeliness."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemAlignmentInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs operational parameters (position, velocity, actuator currents) for post-mortem analysis, fault diagnosis, and performance benchmarking."
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePerformanceInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and historical visualization through interactive dashboards (CAD-based 3D models, time-series plots) for monitoring crane state."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight, SystemStatusInsight
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamically adjusts both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin based on real-time environmental data for closed-loop optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalOptimizationInsight, ActuatorAdjustmentAction
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs predictive analytics to forecast air quality trends under varying conditions (occupancy changes, ventilation adjustments)."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityForecastInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offers real-time dashboards for monitoring indoor air quality metrics (CO2, particulate matter) to enable situational awareness."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityMonitoringInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses data-driven or model-based approaches to identify deviations (sensor failures, mechanical wear) in real-time for maintenance support."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDiagnosisInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures portability and consistency of digital twin components through containerization, enabling easy dissemination and reproducibility."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemReproducibilityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory paths for the gantry crane's actuators to improve energy efficiency and operational performance."
]

instance ActuatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of optimized control signals for the crane's motors and electromagnet."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemAlignmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization status between the physical crane and its digital twin, indicating model fidelity."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified anomalies or deviations in crane operation, including sensor failures or mechanical wear."
]

instance CranePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time performance metrics of the crane, including efficiency, energy consumption, and operational constraints."
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current kinematic state of the crane (position, velocity, acceleration) and alignment with simulated trajectories."
]

instance SystemStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall operational status of the crane system, including component health and environmental conditions."
]

instance EnvironmentalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized environmental conditions (temperature, humidity) for the greenhouse based on real-time data and predictive models."
]

instance ActuatorAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to greenhouse actuators to maintain optimal environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AirQualityForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted air quality trends under varying conditions (occupancy, ventilation) to support proactive management."
]

instance AirQualityMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality metrics (CO2, particulate matter) for situational awareness."
]

instance FaultDiagnosisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed diagnostics of identified faults, including root causes and potential impacts on system operation."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated recommendations for maintenance actions based on fault detection results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemReproducibilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assurance of consistent digital twin behavior across different deployment environments through containerization."
]

instance AirQualityTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical trends and patterns in air quality data to support long-term decision-making."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this Digital Twin system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which generates and transmits control commands to the **Physical Crane Interface** (a Python program) to execute movements. The **command types** include trajectory profiles (optimized by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) and direct control signals (e.g., velocity/position setpoints). **Control message formats** are not explicitly defined but are assumed to be structured data packets (e.g., JSON or binary) compatible with the crane’s controllers. **Validation and authentication mechanisms** are not described, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly ensures command integrity by comparing executed trajectories against simulations, triggering alerts via the **Dashboard** if deviations exceed thresholds. **Feedback systems** are bidirectional: the **Physical Crane Interface** relays real-time sensor data back to the **Control Application** and **Logging Application**, while the **Dashboard** provides operator feedback on system performance. **Conflict resolution** is not explicitly addressed, but the **Trajectory Generator Service** ensures optimal trajectories without residual swinging, minimizing physical conflicts. **Command execution confirmation** is inferred through the **Continuous Validation Service**, which validates trajectory execution against simulations and notifies operators of discrepancies."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system exemplars adopt a **lightweight, ad-hoc orchestration approach** rather than a standardized framework. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplifies **self-adaptive behavior** for both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, implying **closed-loop control** with dynamic adjustments. Orchestration relies on **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for data persistence, **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for event-driven communication, and **virtual machines** for deployment, suggesting a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with loosely coupled components. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** for model-driven digital twin engineering, enabling **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** as distinct services. Orchestration is implemented via **Microsoft Azure tools**, indicating **cloud-native integration** with potential for **scalable resource management** (e.g., auto-scaling for simulation workloads). The **gantry crane** system leverages the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying a **modular, containerized design** with clear separation of concerns (e.g., physical crane control vs. digital twin logic). No centralized orchestrator is mentioned; instead, **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., Docker, VMs) facilitates dissemination and coordination. The exemplars collectively emphasize **domain-specific, ad-hoc integration** over commercial frameworks, with **Raspberry Pi** and **single-board computers** serving as edge nodes for real-time data processing."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models** with fidelity ensured through **prerecorded data** in virtual machine images, allowing for offline validation against historical scenarios. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** to validate model accuracy, with **AutomationML-based models** enabling structured fidelity checks. Uncertainty sources likely include sensor noise, environmental variability, and model approximation errors, though explicit quantification methods (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations, Bayesian inference) are not detailed. Error detection is implicit in the **ad-hoc digital twin pipelines**, where discrepancies between physical and digital twin states trigger adaptive corrections. The **Microsoft Azure tools** in the Air Quality exemplar suggest cloud-based validation frameworks, while the **ad-hoc approach** in GreenhouseDT relies on manual cross-verification between InfluxDB-stored data and ActiveMQ-mediated updates. Quality assurance processes are not explicitly described but are inferred to involve **data consistency checks** (e.g., sensor calibration, message broker validation) and **model retraining** for improved fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure relies on a **service-oriented architecture** with the following key components: **MQTT Broker** for lightweight, publish-subscribe messaging between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Logging Application**). The **network topology** is centralized, with services communicating via the broker and a **TimescaleDB database** acting as a central data repository. **Communication protocols** include MQTT (for inter-service signaling) and direct Python-based interfaces (e.g., **Physical Crane Interface** ↔ **Control Application**). **Bandwidth and latency requirements** are critical for real-time operations; the **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Continuous Validation Service** demand low-latency data flows to ensure trajectory optimization and validation. **Reliability and redundancy mechanisms** are not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implies fault detection via threshold breaches. **Security protocols** are not mentioned, though the use of a dedicated **MQTT Broker** and structured data flows suggests controlled access to services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise**, co-located with the **Physical Crane** system. The **computational requirements** are distributed across six containers: **Database** (TimescaleDB), **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**, **Dashboard** (Grafana), and **MQTT Broker**. **Storage requirements** are handled by the **TimescaleDB database**, which stores time-series data for crane operations, simulations, and validations. **Scalability mechanisms** are not explicitly described, but the modular design (e.g., separate services for trajectory generation, simulation, and validation) allows for potential horizontal scaling of individual components. **Deployment models** are containerized (per C4 Model abstraction) but not specified as cloud/edge/hybrid; the system is tailored for local research use. **Availability/reliability assurance** is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which monitors system performance and alerts operators to deviations, though no explicit redundancy or failover mechanisms are mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The provided Digital Twin exemplars exhibit **limited horizontal integration** with external systems. **GreenhouseDT** and **Air Quality Management** do not reference **ERP, WMS, or other enterprise systems**, focusing instead on **internal toolchains**:
  - **GreenhouseDT**: Uses **InfluxDB** (data storage), **ActiveMQ** (internal messaging), and **virtual machines** (local deployment) with no external dependencies.
  - **Air Quality Management**: Relies on **Microsoft Azure tools** (cloud-based) for pipeline execution but lacks explicit interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT for external systems). The **Raspberry Pi** sensors interface directly with the digital twin without gateway protocols.
  - **Gantry Crane**: No external system integrations are mentioned; the architecture is **self-contained** with **C4 Model** visualization and **containerized deployment** (likely Python/MQTT-based, inferred from domain context). **No interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, REST APIs) or **enterprise system dependencies** (e.g., SCADA, MES) are documented. The **ad-hoc approach** prioritizes internal cohesion over external extensibility."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **partial adherence to industry standards**, with the following key observations:
  - **AutomationML**: The Air Quality Management exemplar explicitly uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, a standard for engineering data exchange in automation and control systems (IEC 62714), ensuring interoperability with other engineering tools (e.g., PLCs, SCADA).
  - **Cloud and Data Standards**: Microsoft Azure tools are employed in the Air Quality Management pipeline, though no specific cloud standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 19086 for cloud interoperability) are mentioned. InfluxDB (GreenhouseDT) adheres to **time-series database standards** (e.g., InfluxData’s line protocol), while ActiveMQ uses **JMS (Java Message Service)** for message brokering.
  - **Hardware Standards**: Raspberry Pi devices are used, which comply with **ARM architecture standards** and **Linux-based embedded systems conventions**, though no domain-specific cyber-physical system (CPS) standards (e.g., IEC 62443 for industrial security) are referenced.
  - **Interoperability**: The use of **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., Docker, VM images) aligns with **portability standards** (e.g., Open Container Initiative), but no explicit API or data interchange standards (e.g., OPC UA, FDT/DTM) are mentioned for cross-system communication.
  - **Certification/Compliance**: No formal certification requirements (e.g., ISO 9001, IEC 61508 for safety) or compliance frameworks (e.g., GDPR for data privacy) are documented. The ad-hoc nature of the exemplars suggests a research-focused rather than production-ready compliance posture.
  - **Domain-Specific Standards**: The Air Quality Management exemplar targets **construction engineering**, but no building automation standards (e.g., ASHRAE 62.1 for ventilation) are explicitly cited. Similarly, GreenhouseDT operates in **agricultural IoT**, with no mention of standards like ISO 11783 (ISOBUS) for agricultural machinery."
]
